$comment: Northwind / Discharge Conveyor CV-200 — Command Center display + tag-ingest config.
SEPARATE from the garage conveyor config (mira-hub/db/seeds/command_center_conveyor.sql,
enterprise.home_garage.conveyor_lab.conveyor_1 and is NOT touched here. This is the
explicit, machine-readable encoding of where the CV-200 live Perspective view is framed
per environment, and how the PLC-laptop gateway feeds CV-200 tags. READ-ONLY: this only
ever records where to *watch* a display and how tags come *in* — never a control endpoint.
Production framing decision: ADR-0024 (dedicated FactoryLM-controlled origin per gateway).

dev.note: Origin-root XFO-stripping reverse proxy in front of the WHOLE PLC-laptop gateway. DEV/STAGING ONLY. Apply via mira-hub/db/seeds/command_center_northwind_cv200.sql.

staging.note: Same origin-root proxy as dev. Verify framing (green dot + live tags) before any prod registration.

production.note: Dedicated FactoryLM-controlled origin per gateway/customer (ADR-0024). NOT the raw Ignition gateway, NOT the dev-only 8890 proxy. Origin not yet provisioned. When it is: register via POST /api/command-center/display, and this host MUST be present in COMMAND_CENTER_DISPLAY_HOST_ALLOWLIST while the raw gateway and 127.0.0.1:8890 MUST NOT be.

raw_gateway_reference_DO_NOT_FRAME.why: Gateway sends X-Frame-Options: SAMEORIGIN gateway-wide; Perspective is an absolute-path SPA. Direct framing is blocked, and the raw gateway must never be a production display target (ADR-0024).

ingest.note: Ignition gateway timer reads CV-200 OPC tags and POSTs the canonical batch (build_ingest_batch shape) as tenant_id above, source_system 'ignition'. Tags not in the Northwind allowlist seed are rejected fail-closed. One-pipeline law: no forked normalizer/allowlist/persist (.claude/rules/one-pipeline-ingest.md).
